rulings.Case Title: S & H CONSTRUCTION, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. METROPOLITAN COFFEE & CONCESSION, LLC, A et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, July 2, 2010, line 1, PLAINTIFF S & H CONSTRUCTION, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Off calendar per moving party. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ARNULFO GALAN VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (A GOVERNMENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, July 2, 2010, line 2, PLAINTIFF ARNULFO GALAN'S COUNSEL'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED IF ATTORNEY CAN SHOW THAT MOTION WAS SERVED ON CLIENT. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW DIMITRIOU VS. CIT FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, July 2, 2010, line 3, DEFENDANT CIT FINANCIAL SERVICES INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO (1)PLEAD THE CONTRACTUAL BASIS AND (2)TO PLEAD BREACH. 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FRAUD WITH PARTICULARITY. 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD BASIS FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SERGIO IANTORNO VS. LAW OFFICES OF WIEGEL & FRIED et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, July 2, 2010, line 4, DEFENDANTS LAW OFFICES OF WIEGEL & FRIED, CLIFFORD FRIED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED IN PART AND SUSTAINED IN PART. OVERRULED AS TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (LEGAL MALPRACTICE). THE CONTINUING REPRESENTATION TOLLING PROVISION OF CCP SECTION 340.6(a)(2) APPLIES IN THAT THE SAME SPECIFIC SUBJECT MATTER WAS ADDRESSED IN THE 2 SUITS. BOTH INVOLVED SETTLING THE PROSPECTIVE INTERESTS OF THE PARTIES IN 816 SCOTT STREET, INCLUDING A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR WRONGFUL EVICTION IN MARTINS ACTION. THE CONTINUING REPRESENTATION TOLLING PROVISION APPLIES. RULING MADE WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BRINGING FUTURE DISPOSITIVE MOTION REGARDING STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS ADDRESSING FACTUAL ISSUES. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2ND, 3RD AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION TO PLEAD FRAUD WITH SPECIFITY AND ALLEGE MISREPRESENTATIONS. PLEADING MUST STATE MORE THAN MERE LEGAL CONCLUSIONS. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MANJOAN FOOD SERVICES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration And Request For Award Of Attorneys' Fees; Declarations Of Phil Foster And Christie Tour-Sarkissian In Support
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, July 2, 2010, line 5, PETITIONERS MANJOAN FOOD SERVICES, INC., DIDIER LABBE Petition To Compel Arbitration And Request For Award Of Attorneys' Fees. DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES DENIED. SECTION 29 REQUIRES MEDIATION BEFORE THE PARTIES RESORT TO ARBITRATION OR COURT ACTION. THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO MEDIATION AND THIS PETITION IS PREMATURE. =(302/CWW)
